SEARCH
Package taskmanager.impl

Class DefaultTaskManagerBuilder

java.lang.Object
taskmanager.impl.DefaultTaskManagerBuilder
All Implemented Interfaces:
TaskManager.TaskManagerBuilder
public class DefaultTaskManagerBuilder extends Object implements TaskManager.TaskManagerBuilder
Default implementation of the TaskManagerBuilder interface. This builder is responsible for constructing a TaskManager instance by configuring its required components such as: - TaskService - SchedulePlanner - Weather API client If components are not provided, default implementations are used.

    • withStoragePath

      public TaskManager.TaskManagerBuilder withStoragePath(String path)
      Sets the storage path for saving tasks.
      Specified by:
      withStoragePath in interface TaskManager.TaskManagerBuilder
      Parameters:
      path - the file system path for storage
      Returns:
      the builder instance for chaining

    • build

      public TaskManager build()
      Builds and returns a fully configured TaskManager instance. If no custom components are provided, default implementations are used: - DefaultTaskService for task management - SchedulePlannerImpl for scheduling
      Specified by:
      build in interface TaskManager.TaskManagerBuilder
      Returns:
      a configured TaskManager instance
